title: Multimodal Tokenization
code:
import numpy as np

def clip_contrastive_logits(image_embeds, text_embeds, temperature=0.07):
    I = image_embeds / np.linalg.norm(image_embeds, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    T = text_embeds / np.linalg.norm(text_embeds, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return np.matmul(I, T.T) / temperature

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print('CLIP contrastive logits configured.')
